gen.title: Generate Scripts
gen.description: Scripts every table in this database as CREATE statements — optionally with its indexes and foreign keys. Nothing is changed: the script opens in a query tab, or is written to a file.
gen.field.dropFirst: Add DROP TABLE before each CREATE
gen.error.unsupported: Generate Scripts doesn't support the '{0}' engine yet (Postgres, MySQL, SQL Server and SQLite).
gen.script.header:
-- Schema of {0} — {1} table(s), scripted by SQL Explorer.
-- Review before running: this creates objects and does not check whether they already exist.
gen.result.opened: Opened a script for {0} table(s) from {1} in a query tab.
gen.result.cancelled: No file chosen — nothing was written.
